Notice Of Motion To Mediate;
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Set For Trial On Jun-29-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-12-09 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 504
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Safeway, Inc.'s Motion to Mediate in lieu of Judicial Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Court ordered case scheduled for a Mediation Order to Show Cause on 4/8/2009 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date of 6/29/2009 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlemend Conference. Proceedings not reported. (212)
